MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Motion for an Order to Distribute Settlement Funds Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Paul Vaillancourt, Esq. for Plaintiffs/Legal Heirs of Decedent: Richard McKenzie.
Kurt Micklow, Esq. for Linda McKenzie, as Sucessor in Interest of the Decedent, was sworn and examined.
As stipulated by counsels, Declarations of Debbie Walz, Norman McKenzie and Richard A. McKenzie, received and filed in court.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court takena the matter under submission.
Blank proposed Order submitted.

4:30 P.M.
Order granted and signed by Comm. Kaplan, see scanned doc. for details of the Order.
